{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323043320FD870669B49DB3D94215"}"},"total":4302},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7258175615080694565","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书，思路清晰，内容充实具体，人物饱满，人物性格，贴近生活既有优点又有缺点。事件环环相扣逻辑合理，较好的展现了北宋末期水浒世界的另一面，可以满足诸位读者对水浒传原剧情的不满和惋惜。目前整体不错希望这本书不要烂尾，作者，加油。","text_exts":[{"e":81,"s":78,"text":"水浒传","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B0%B4%E6%B5%92%E4%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774211600B3D94215%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227258175615080694565%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227249068105639398404%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B0%B4%E6%B5%92%E4%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689925799,"group_id":"7249068105639398404","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"初出茅庐，新人作家。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxut8bcAKaIwBkdE9k8tH7A=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"389675353379005","user_name":"卢克鲁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"389675353379005","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF",
